Tested with light bulbs (L510, L520, L530, L535, L610, L630), light strips (L900, L920, L930), plugs (P100, P105, P110, P110M, P115),     power strips (P300, P304M, P316M), hubs (H100), switches (S200B, S200D) and sensors (KE100, T100, T110, T300, T310, T315).
